name: sidecar-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the Sidecar plugin — call any OpenRouter-hosted LLM as a Claude CLI subagent

plugins.name: sidecar
plugins.description: Call any OpenRouter-hosted LLM (Gemini, GPT, DeepSeek, Claude, etc.) as a Claude CLI subagent. Runs a vendored local proxy that translates Anthropic API <-> OpenAI chat-completions format, so claude -p can route to non-Anthropic models cleanly.
